history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A person is lying on their side on a grassy bank, drinking from a can. The person is wearing a light-colored long-sleeved shirt and grey pants. They are seen from the side, with their arm raised to their mouth. The background is a wide, calm body of water with a tree-lined shore in the distance. The sky is a hazy, pale yellow-green, suggesting either early morning or late afternoon light. The overall mood is peaceful and serene. The image has a slightly desaturated, vintage aesthetic, with a soft focus and a warm, golden-hour color palette dominated by greens, blues, and yellows. The composition is oriented vertically, with the person in the foreground and the water and landscape stretching out behind them. The lighting is soft and diffused, casting gentle shadows. The image appears to be a still from a video, as indicated by the playback controls at the bottom of the frame.
